title: Re-export Phase B channel ptr and preempt symbols

source.subject: fix(abi): re-export Phase B channel ptr and preempt symbols from crate root

body:
Crate root re-exports Phase B channel pointer and preempt symbols required by composition lowering and frozen ABI tests.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`791fac7`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/791fac7)
- **Subject:** fix(abi): re-export Phase B channel ptr and preempt symbols from crate root
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `concurrency-runtime`
- **Domain:** `execution`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
